title: DataAccessRequestPayload
description: Payload for Data Access Request tasks.

accessType.description: Scope of access being requested against the target entity.

requestedAccess.description: Permission level for the requested access.

accessType.description: Scope of access being requested. FullAccess grants access to all columns, ColumnLevel restricts to the columns listed in 'columns', Masked grants access to masked or anonymized data.

requestedAccess.description: Permission level for the access (Read, Write, Admin). Defaults to Read.

columns.description: Fully qualified column names included in the request when accessType is ColumnLevel.

assets.description: List of assets being requested access to.

ticketId.description: External ticket ID (JIRA, ServiceNow) if required.

manualGrantReason.description: System-generated summary of why this request was routed to manual approval instead of being granted automatically — for example a partial automatic grant, an enforcement failure, or a timeout during automated evaluation. Absent when access was granted automatically.
